arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes would 'only be fit to put out cones for the Class of 92' claims former Premier League manager - in BRUTAL verdict on Man United squad
arts.sum: A former Premier League manager issued a brutal verdict on Man United's struggling squad this season, arguing that none of them would get near the starting XI under Sir Alex Ferguson.

arts.ttl: European giants overtake Arsenal and Man Utd for Nigerian superstar
arts.sum: Osimhen joined Galatasaray last summer on loan for the season from Napoli until June 2025. Juventus have overtaken Arsenal and Man Utd in the race to sign Victor Osimhen this summer.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal send scouts to Italy to watch £70m striker and he scored right in front of them
arts.sum: TBR Football can reveal that Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea have been keeping tabs on Inter Milan striker Marcus Thuram. All three Premier League clubs are...

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard digs out own form for title hopefuls Arsenal
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has just five goal contributions to his name in 19 Premier League appearances for Arsenal in the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'reach agreement with new sporting director' after devising four-man shortlist to replace Edu
arts.sum: Edu was hired in 2019 as technical director before he saw a promotion to sporting director role and has been a key element to Arsenal's success throughout the past campaigns.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United host Arsenal at Old Trafford in a huge Premier League clash on Super Sunday on March 9, live on Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Luis Suarez's Man United clause, Barcelona's £90m premium and other contract agreements
arts.sum: While some contract clauses include hefty bonuses for winning titles, scoring goals and making appearances, others are quite frankly downright strange

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim interview ahead of Arsenal at home on 9 March
arts.sum: "In the small things in our game, I see improvement," he explained. "I think we are improving in the last two games [before Real Sociedad], for example, the way we have possession.

arts.ttl: Man United told they would need to pay £59m to sign “monster” midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester United have learned the transfer fee of one of their transfer targets as Ruben Amorim plans to strengthen the squad. The Red Devils are expected to be active in the summer transfer window after a poor season. They are currently in the bottom half of the Premier League, their worst position in decades. arts.ttl: Arsenal stance on Raheem Sterling has emerged after disastrous season for Gunners
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling joined Arsenal from Chelsea on loan in the summer last year. The former Manchester City man, who has the experience of winning the Premier League with Pep Guardiola’s team, was expected to offer experience, depth and quality to Mikel Arteta’s side.
